_note: Export the live n8n Zoho Cliq bot workflow here.
_instructions: 2. Open the Cliq Bot / ABM Automation workflow
3. Click the three-dot menu (top right) → Download
4. Save the downloaded .json file as this file (n8n-cliq-bot-export.json)
5. Before committing: remove hardcoded credentials, API keys, Zoho tokens, or internal email addresses
6. Replace sensitive values with placeholder strings like '<ZOHO_CRM_TOKEN>', '<APOLLO_API_KEY>', '<CLIQ_WEBHOOK_URL>'
